channel.title: Stationery & Office Supplies on LEGO barato - Cheap - Angebote - Cadeaux

item.title: Lego Note Brick Multicolor
item.description:
You’ve got Lego Note Brick Multicolor at the following link:

ℹ️:

  • IRRESISTIBLE LEGO DESK ACCESSORY: More than 200 colorful note sheets with a LEGO brick design are housed in a keepsake box that looks just like a stack of 2x4 bricks. Send a LEGO note to a friend, leave yourself a reminder, or make a LEGO set shopping list with this unique brick-tastic stationery!
  • NEW BOLD COLORS: This notepaper set features bright, classic LEGO colors.
  • A NEW SPIN ON A CLASSIC BRAND: For generations, LEGO bricks have been igniting creativity and imagination. Let this surprising take on iconic bricks spark new ideas and possibilities!
  • FEATURES: 224 full-color notes in a box with lid (3 1/8 x 5 x 1½ inches)
  • PERFECT FOR: LEGO fans looking for ways to engage with the bricks beyond the sets; back-to-school or office supplies; stocking stuffers and Easter basket add-ins; Mother’s Day, Father’s Day, graduation, and birthday gift-giving.

🛒 Check the deal!!

Check the price of this item in other countries:
